items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of a scenario involving deposit collection versus full payment. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or results from the simulation of this scenario, nor does it confirm whether the expected result of a clear, actionable failure report was achieved. Without concrete evidence or outcomes from the simulation, the requirement remains unverified, leading to an inconclusive status.
